AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Find the last saved parking location for your cars. Operational Patterns: - Get the list of currently tracked cars by calling 'getCarNames'. - Get the coordinates (plus useful direct link to Google Maps) by calling 'findCar' with one of the car names. Usually most users will just track a single car, so remembering its name should simplify the process and a simple 'findCar' call will be faster than querying everytime for the list of available cars.
